message:
feat(stdlib): Add unittest.mock and doctest modules

unittest.mock (Lib/unittest/mock.zig):
- Mock class with return_value, side_effect, call tracking
- MagicMock with __len__, __bool__, __contains__, __iter__
- Patch for context-managed mocking
- PropertyMock, AsyncMock, NonCallableMock
- assert_called, assert_called_once, assert_not_called
- Child mocks for attribute access
- Builder pattern: returns(), withSideEffect()

doctest (Lib/doctest.zig):
- DocTestParser to extract examples from docstrings
- DocTestRunner to execute tests
- OutputChecker for comparing expected vs actual
- Example and DocTest data structures
- testmod, testfile, run_docstring_examples functions
- OPTIONFLAGS constants
- Note: Stub implementation for AOT - can't execute docstrings at runtime

Also updated unittest.zig to export mock module.
